script: { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "Organization", "name": "TerraGuard", "url": "https://terraguard.ge", "description": "AI-powered early disease detection for vineyards using drone multispectral imaging. Detects powdery mildew, downy mildew, and crop stress before visible symptoms appear.", "email": "info@terraguard.ge", "foundingLocation": "Tbilisi, Georgia", "foundingDate": "2024", "areaServed": "Georgia, South Caucasus" }
